title: Flowise SQL injection in importChatflows via unsanitized chatflow IDs
description: The importChatflows function in Flowise constructs a SQL IN clause by string-interpolating chatflow IDs from imported JSON directly into the query string. An authenticated user can craft a malicious JSON file with a chatflow ID such as "') {malicious SQL} --" to inject arbitrary SQL, enabling data exfiltration from the database including encrypted credentials.
